title: Recording Indicator
description: A simple recording/streaming indicator that shows next to a player's name in the tab list
body: # Recording Indicator by Acronical This is a simple Spigot plugin that will add a small indicator next to a player's name in the tab list whenever they are live/recording. ## Commands - `/recording ` - Toggles the indicator - `/live ` - Toggles the indicator ## Installation - Download the latest release from the [releases](https://github.com/AcronicalYT/RecordingIndicator/releases) page. - Place the plugin into the `plugins` folder on the server. - Launch the server. ## Support Me:
